expires_today.title: The Ultimate Functional Programming by Pragmatic Programmers
expires_today.long_description: Start creating with a function-focused mindset with the all-new Functional Programming Bundle by Pragmatic Programmers. Learn to execute a variety of functions to save time and energy for yourself, a business, or a new programming hobby. Unlock cornerstone eBooks like Domain Modeling Made Functional, Programming Clojure Fourth Edition, From Objects to Functions, and more. Get practical resources for novice coders and seasoned pros, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

expires_today.title: Realm Giants

expires_today.title: Omniverse Complete Audio Collection – Premium Music and Sound Effects
expires_today.description: Complete Audio Collection: Access 300K+ Tracks & FX
expires_today.long_description:
You get 2,245 tracks and up to 1,000 downloads from choosing from over 300,000 tracks! Level up your sound game.

The Omniverse Complete Audio Collection drops 2,245 premium royalty-free music tracks and sound effects from AudioHero into one massive bundle. Think Icelandic waterfalls. Indie rock. Lunar landscapes. Household foley. Sci-fi labs. Orchestral crescendos.

Plus, it includes historical and famous packs from previous bundles – so you're getting the best of the best, all in one place. Whatever your project – game, podcast, video, reel, film – you get a full royalty-free license, no recurring fees. Just pure creative fuel.

Explore playlists like Transportation & Motion, Conflict & Battle, World Ambiences, Cinematic Scores, Rock Rage, EDM, Emotional Building, Children & Holidays, ASMR Essentials, and way more than we can list here.

Pick the tier that fits. Dive in. From epic showdowns to quiet, haunting moments, from crowded stadiums to cartoon chaos—it's all inside.

The Omniverse Complete Audio Collection isn't just a library. It's your audio arsenal. Grab it on Huble Bundle today. You'll be back for seconds.



Keys expire. Please redeem before May 25th, 2027

expires_tomorrow.title: The Complete Claude Design and Lovable Automation Super Bundle
expires_tomorrow.description: Speed to market with Claude Design
expires_tomorrow.long_description:
Get the expert advice you need to launch new products quickly when you unlock a massive 40+ course Claude and Lovable bundle highlighted by a “how to build” collection covering apps, landing pages, newsletters, animated explainers, and escape rooms! You’ll never write another line of AI-free code again once you see how fast and frictionless Claude Coding and Lovable are to work with. Keys expire. Please redeem before June 9th, 2027

expires_tomorrow.title: Hot Mess Express: A Big Bundle of Misfit Heroes & Hilarious Hijinks by Image Comics
expires_tomorrow.long_description:
The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Lose yourself in a library of fantastic graphic fiction in The Hot Mess Express Bundle by Image Comics! Read creative graphic novels like Snotgirl Vol. 1: Green Hair Don’t Care, the coming-of-age story of Lottie Person, a chic yet insecure fashionista with a mysterious snot condition; I Hate Fairyland Deluxe Vol. 1-3, a mischievously magical dark adventure akin to Alice in Wonderland; and Dead Eyes Vol. 1, the origin story of Martin Dobbs, a former masked criminal forced back into a life of crime to pay his wife’s medical bills. Get 40+ comics and graphic novels, and help support The BINC Foundation with your purchase!

expires_tomorrow.title: Dungeon Masters Role-Playing Essentials- 3D Printable Miniatures & Scenery
expires_tomorrow.long_description: Take your passion for Dungeons & Dragons to the next level, and start creating your own campaign assets from home! Customize your own miniature figures and gorgeous scenery with an epic collection of 3D printing-ready templates from Hayland Terrains and Warp Miniatures! Campaigns become more personal when you put your creativity and imagination into them, so don’t wait, print and color your own Barbarian Riders, multi-part pirates, behemoth Wyverns, and more. Pay what you want for 3D-printable templates and help support the magic at Make-A-Wish with your purchase!

expires_tomorrow.title: Ultimate Unreal and Unity Assets Galore and More
expires_tomorrow.long_description:
Make your life easier with modular fantasy assets from the experts at Hivemind. Add spooky mystery and intrigue to the setting of your next big project with the Modular Haunted House Building Kit. Unlock the ultimate Unreal Engine and Unity asset bundle and help support Make-A-Wish with your purchase.

Keys Expire. Please redeem before May 19th, 2027. Professional Fab Marketplace keys and Unity Asset Store keys provided.

expires_tomorrow.title: Mercedes Lackey: Valdemar and Beyond by DAW Books
expires_tomorrow.description: Explore the worlds of a fantasy legend
expires_tomorrow.long_description: If you’re a fantasy fan, you’ve probably heard of Mercedes Lackey, one of the most prolific and influential voices in the sci-fi/fantasy arena. If you’ve always meant to pick up one of her books but never got around to it, or if you’ve read a little of her work and are dying for more, we’ve got an ebook bundle full to the brim of Lackey’s biggest and best, from her bestselling Valdemar saga and beyond! Dive into the Kingdom of Valdemar with the first entry in the series, the magical adventure Arrows of the Queen. Reawaken the lost magic of the land in Winds of Fate. Solve the mystery of a young mage-in-training’s secret past in the dark academia adventure Intrigues. There are 37 books in total to explore in this bundle, so get it now for the price of your choice, and ALA’s Freedom to Read Foundation with your purchase!

expires_tomorrow.title: The Ultimate Giga Cosmos Bundle
expires_tomorrow.long_description:
Looking for a little help crafting the rich worlds of your next game project? Then The Ultimate Giga Cosmos Bundle is the 1,000+ asset library you need! This cosmos-sized collection contains everything you need, from the steampunk assets within the Victorian Environment Megapack to fantasy alien castles and magical elven cities. Unleash your creative potential and bring your imagination to life like never before with a 1-month trial subscription to Cosmos, Leartes’ expansive selection of high-quality 3D assets! Pay what you want for the ultimate asset bundle and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before April 20th, 2027.

expires_within_72h.title: Double Shift: Simulation Bundle
expires_within_72h.long_description:
Love simulator games but feel like you’ve exhausted all your options? We guarantee you’ll find something to love in this bundle of sim games of all types! Take on the rustic country living in the near-endless open world of Farmer’s Life! Build your own hype house and influence your way to fame and fortune in Youtubers Life and Youtubers Life 2! Tune up your dream cars and hit the streets in the racing sim game Underground Garage! There’s so much more to explore and enjoy in this bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choice, and choose which charity to support with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 10th, 2027

expires_within_72h.title: Perplexing Puzzles
expires_within_72h.long_description:
Flex your puzzle-solving skills and bend your brain into new shapes with this bundle of the best puzzle games! Challenge your sense of reality and jump inside the instant camera photos you take in Viewfinder! Solve logic puzzles to progress through a mysterious world full of secrets in Taiji! Work as a team and solve both halves of a puzzle to escape a deadly experiment in two-player co-op Parallel Experiment! There are even more exciting puzzle games to lose yourself inside in this bundle, so don’t get stumped—grab it now at the price of your choice, and support the Trevor Project with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem Viewfinder before December 10th, 2026. All other titles before June 10th, 2027.

expires_within_72h.title: IK Multimedia Presents Studio Essentials: Pianos, Bass, Drums & Cinematic Sounds
expires_within_72h.long_description:
Create the perfect audioscape for your next game or creative project with IK Multimedia’s curated collection of studio essentials! Capture the magic of classic instruments from this extensive 1,000+ asset library of commercial-ready string, bass, and drum samples from themed packs like MODO BASS Studio Upright, Pianoverse - Grand Piano Y7, Miroslav Philharmonik 2, and more! Explore a variety of genres, from lo-fi to classical and everything in between. Get the assets you need to achieve the sound you’re looking for, and support Music Will with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 2nd, 2027

expires_within_72h.title: The Rust Systems Programming Bundle
expires_within_72h.long_description: Rust has quickly become one of the most important languages for developers who want to build fast, safe, and reliable software without giving up performance. That’s why we’ve put together this practical Rust bundle, packed with hands-on ebooks from Packt to help you learn the language from the ground up and apply it to real-world projects. Across this bundle, you’ll explore Rust fundamentals, async programming, concurrency, web development, systems programming, C++ and Python integration, WebAssembly, blockchain, and performance-critical development. Whether you’re new to Rust or ready to go deeper, this bundle will help you build production-grade software with confidence. Grab it while you can and support Cancer Research UK with your purchase at the price of your choice!

expires_within_72h.title: Humble 15th Anniversary - Indie Icons Showcase
expires_within_72h.description: An anniversary present from us to you!
expires_within_72h.long_description:
Happy Anniversary to us! We’re celebrating 15 years of Humble Bundle with another extra-special bundle of our favorite indie games! Guide a cursed orphan through a demon-infested castle before your body turns to crystal in Castlevania’s spiritual successor Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night! Play an upgraded spin on an old favorite in iconic roguelike Risk of Rain Returns, where the passenger of a crashed freighter must survive on an alien planet of monsters! Climb a haunted mountain and defeat nightmares, panic, and self-doubt in Celeste! There are even more great games in this bundle we’re sure you’ll love just as much as we do, so grab them now, and support the Electronic Frontier Foundation with your purchase!

expires_within_72h.long_description:

Get tactical in Wildfrost, a roguelike deckbuilder where you’ll fight to collect cards strong enough to defrost an eternal winter! Turn up the fun dial in The Spirit Lift, a retro analog-style deckbuilder set in a haunted 1990s hotel. Or uncover the mysteries of BOOK OF HOURS, a narrative RPG with deckbuilding elements set in a fictional 1930s world filled with hidden gods.
